mapper.insert: INSERT INTO feed_record (feed_point_id, feed_point_name, user_id, user_name, feed_time, feed_content, animal_count, create_time) VALUES (#{feedPointId}, #{feedPointName}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{feedTime}, #{feedContent}, #{animalCount}, #{createTime})
mapper.update:
UPDATE feed_record
feed_point_id = #{feedPointId},
feed_point_name = #{feedPointName},
user_id = #{userId},
user_name = #{userName},
feed_time = #{feedTime},
feed_content = #{feedContent},
animal_count = #{animalCount},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM feed_record WHERE id IN
#{id}
